name: CFSC New Money Express
description_short: CFSC New Money Express offers check cashing without a bank account, plus money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid debit cards at Kansas City locations.
description_long:
CFSC New Money Express is a financial services company operating multiple locations, with the Broadway Boulevard branch in Kansas City, MO serving as a key hub. The company positions itself as a simplified alternative to traditional banking for everyday money services, particularly targeting unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to cash and financial services.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of check-cashing and money services including check cashing (personal and business), money orders, electronic bill pay, domestic and international money transfers, prepaid debit cards (branded as Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, installment loans, foreign currency exchange, prepaid cellular services, phone resale through EcoATM kiosks, transit card purchases, and tax refund check cashing. They emphasize speed—checks cash without waiting for clearance—and accessibility for those without bank accounts.

CFSC differentiates itself through breadth of services offered in a single location, no credit check requirements for their prepaid debit card product, foreign currency exchange services (80+ countries), and partnerships with affiliates including Western Union, Boost Mobile, and EcoATM. Their extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 10am-6pm Saturday) cater to working-age consumers. The company appears to be part of a larger network with multiple locations across regions.

As a check-cashing and financial services company, CFSC serves a legitimate market need for those without traditional bank access. However, consumers should understand that check-cashing services typically carry fees not disclosed on their location page, and installment loans may carry significant interest rates. The emphasis on speed over traditional banking channels suggests this is primarily a convenience/payday-adjacent service rather than wealth-building financial infrastructure.
pros: No bank account required to cash checks—accepted with just photo ID and personal information
Same-day check cashing without waiting for fund clearance
No credit check required for Yes! Debit Account prepaid cards
Extended business hours (7pm weekdays, 6pm Saturday) accommodate working schedules
Foreign currency exchange services covering 80+ countries in one location
Comprehensive service mix (check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, ATM) in single location
Business check cashing available in addition to personal checks
cons: Check-cashing fees not disclosed on location page; typical industry fees apply
Installment loans offered but terms, APR, and fees not detailed online
Website notes 'services aren't identical at every location'—requires phone confirmation for specific services
Prepaid debit card (Yes! Debit) functions as an alternative to banking but lacks traditional account protections
No mention of customer service protections, dispute resolution, or regulatory oversight specifics
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate check-cashing without account requirements
International workers or travelers needing foreign currency exchange and money transfers
Gig workers and contractors requiring quick business check-cashing services
Consumers seeking consolidated financial services (bill pay, money orders, ATM) outside traditional banking
diagnosis: CFSC New Money Express is best for unbanked consumers and gig workers who need quick check-cashing and money services outside the traditional banking system. Key caveat: check-cashing and financial services like these typically carry undisclosed fees and higher costs than bank accounts; consumers should confirm all fees and loan terms by phone before using services.
